Branding.Tagline: Clean your Android device. Remove bloatware. Take control.
Sidebar.UsbHint: Turn on USB debugging in Developer options so your phone can be detected.
Device.Title: Select a Device
Device.Subtitle: Choose the Android device you want to manage.
Device.NoDevices: No devices detected. Connect a device with USB debugging enabled, then press Refresh.
Apps.SearchWatermark: Search apps by name or package name...
Device.EnsureHint: Ensure the device is connected via USB, USB debugging is enabled, and you have allowed the computer authorization.
Apps.Subtitle: Review installed apps, filter bloatware, and remove selected packages.
RemovalConfirm.Warning: The selected applications will be removed for the current user. This action cannot be undone.
RemovalProgress.DoNotDisconnect: Please do not disconnect your device.
RemovalComplete.Subtitle: The applications have been removed successfully.
Settings.AutoUpdateHint: Automatically update bloatware database in the background.
About.Subtitle: Learn more about the application and the open-source project.
About.Description: A free and open-source desktop application to help you safely identify and remove unwanted or bloat applications from your Android devices.
About.WebsiteDesc: Visit the official website for more information.
About.GitHubDesc: View source code, contribute, and star the project.
About.IssueDesc: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Let us know.
About.DocDesc: Learn how to use SNB Desktop effectively.
